---
title: "Cherry Blossom Season"
description: |
  How do you enjoy them?
date: '2026-03-18'
image: "cherryblossoms.jpg"
categories:
    - DC
    - Adventure
format: html
toc: true
lightbox: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  error: false
  message: false
draft: false
---

```{r}
library(here)
source(here("packages.R"))
source(here("functions.R"))

series_filter = 10

data = pollresults(series_filter)
```

```{r}
simple_bar_question(data, "Location")
```

```{r}
simple_bar_question(data, "Vibe")
```

```{r}
simple_bar_question(data, "Time")
```

```{r}
simple_bar_question(data, "Color")
```

```{r}
simple_bar_question(data, "Activity")
```
